hero.title: Mhaol Media
hero.subtitle: Your media, your files, your rules. Mhaol Media is an open-source media server that gives you full ownership and control over your movies, TV shows, music, games, photos, YouTube downloads, and books — no subscriptions, no surveillance, no lock-in.

features.heading: Everything in One Place
features.subheading: Browse, organize, and stream all your media from a single self-hosted server.

movies.title: Movies
movies.description: Browse your movie library with rich TMDB metadata, posters, and AI-powered torrent search to find and stream any film.

tv.title: TV Shows
tv.description: Track series, manage episodes and seasons, and stream TV shows with automatic metadata and torrent integration.

music.title: Music
music.description: Manage your music collection with MusicBrainz metadata, album art, artist info, and synchronized lyrics.

games.title: Games
games.description: Browse your game library with RetroAchievements integration, track progress, and discover new titles across consoles.

photos.title: Photos
photos.description: Organize and browse your photo collection with tagging, albums, and a beautiful gallery view.

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.description: Download and organize YouTube videos locally. Search, preview, and queue downloads with full format control.

books.title: Books
books.description: Read EPUBs and PDFs, track your reading progress, and organize your book collection offline.

smartSearch.heading: Smart Search
smartSearch.description: Select any movie, show, album, or game from your library and Smart Search does the rest. It reads the metadata — title, year, artist, console — searches for torrents, and ranks each result by relevance, quality, and language, automatically picking the best match.
smartSearch.step1: Pick a title from your library — the metadata (title, year, artist, console) is read automatically
smartSearch.step2: Torrents are searched using the parsed metadata as the query
smartSearch.step3: Each result is scored against the exact title and your preferences
smartSearch.step4: Results are ranked — the best candidate is auto-selected for you

addons.heading: Powered by Addons
addons.subheading: Modular integrations that bring rich metadata, lyrics, search, and more to your media server.

tmdb.title: TMDB
tmdb.description: Movie and TV metadata from The Movie Database — posters, backdrops, cast, ratings, and recommendations.

musicbrainz.title: MusicBrainz
musicbrainz.description: Comprehensive music metadata — artists, albums, tracks, release dates, and cover art from the open music encyclopedia.

retroachievements.title: RetroAchievements
retroachievements.description: Retro gaming metadata and achievement tracking — game info, box art, and achievement progress across classic consoles.

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.description: YouTube video extraction and downloading — search, preview, and download videos in any format and quality.

lrclib.title: LRCLIB
lrclib.description: Synchronized lyrics — fetch time-stamped lyrics for your music library and display them in the player.

torrentSearch.title: Torrent Search
torrentSearch.description: Torrent search across public indexes — find, compare, and add torrents with size, seeder, and trust indicators.

platforms.heading: Download
platforms.macos_install: After downloading, remove the quarantine attribute to run the app.
platforms.linux_install: Make the AppImage executable and run it.

footer.tagline: Free, open-source media server for everyone.
footer.built_with: Built with Svelte, Tauri, and Rust.
